narrative:
Precinct Urbana 3-B (precinct in Champaign County) has 907 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.2 percentage points.
